{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Jade senses
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has [[Jade senses]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
